headline: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Stock Looks Cheap On Earnings But Mixed On Value
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb stock has logged a solid 29.2% return over the past year, yet its valuation checks point to a mixed picture rather than a straightforward bargain or an obviously expensive share price. The 29.2% gain over the past 12 months puts recent shareholders in a strong position, raising the question of how much of the good news is already reflected in the price. Investor attention on new oncology and cardiology programs, including recent trial collaborations and regulatory...
